message:
Add vectorized VDBE execution with morsel-driven dispatch

Engine (engine.rs, +188 lines):
- Implement batch ColumnBatch type for columnar data representation
- Add morsel-driven dispatch loop that processes data in configurable
  batch sizes for improved cache locality
- Implement pipeline-breaker handling for sort and aggregate operations
  that require materializing intermediate results

Code generation (codegen.rs, +25 lines):
- Emit new opcodes for vectorized scan and aggregate operations that
  feed the morsel-driven dispatch pipeline

Property-based tests (vectorized_prop_tests.rs, +153 lines):
- Add proptest-based verification of column batch invariants ensuring
  batch sizes, column counts, and data alignment are always consistent
- Verify pipeline output determinism: same input always produces the
  same output regardless of morsel size or pipeline scheduling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
